reviews.review_description: Well so far I'm enjoying it it's a little harder you definitely have to conserve your ammo more than I thought you would. I noticed one of the reviews saying he couldn't figure out where to go after the tutorial if you read this go back to the elevator and hit the button

developer_response.body:
Hi there. We are so glad to hear you are enjoying the game. You hit the nail on the head carefully managing your ammo is definitely a huge part of the challenge.

Also, a big thank you for helping out the community with that elevator tip. It's really awesome to see players looking out for each other.

Thanks for playing and taking the time to leave such a great review.

Best,
The Development Team

reviews.review_description: This is a early release game but it looks like it could be a great game but it has its issues like they could get you hurt you through the wall somehow and please to developers of this game put a option where you could shut off the subtitle because when it talks and the caption comes out and there is the centipede or whatever creature is attacking you it's hard to look at it and shoot because the caption. There is other problems as well because it seems like the speed of the character that I explained the creatures somehow always seems to catch up to me no matter what and I don't know what the jump button is for when you can't do nothing with it. When this problem gets solved I will put in more stars in the reviews that it deserves. Thank you

developer_response.body:
Hi there, thanks for playing the game and for the kind words about the graphics. we really appreciate you taking the time to leave this feedback.

We are currently working on a fix for the bug where you get hit through walls. I’ve also taken note of your suggestion for a subtitle toggle and keeping VR field of view clear when a centipede is attacking is definitely a priority. we will be adjusting the creature's speed as well so the chases feel much more fair.

Your input is incredibly helpful. we hope the upcoming updates smooth out these issues and earn those extra stars!

Best,
The Developer

reviews.review_description: It wob't boot up for some odd reason as it just stops when I try to load up the game and brings me back to the menu ;-; and I have an oculus quest 2 which this game supports ;_;
Always excited for new indie games will change review after play
